chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Misc.A. No. S –528 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.01.2018. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 511 / 2018. Mr. Nasrullah Unar, Advocate for the applicant alongwith the applicant. Urgency granted. Learned counsel for the applicant under the instructions does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application as the alleged detenues have already been released. Under the circumstances this criminal miscellaneous application stands disposed of as withdrawn. JUDGE A.
